message:
feat(dashboard): pass initial terminal size to vsock session

Add cols and rows query parameters to the WebSocket URL when connecting
to the terminal. This allows the backend to set the correct PTY size
from the start, avoiding the need for an immediate resize after connect.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
